# Life Agent OS

> An open-source Rust monorepo for autonomous AI agents. 76 crates, 2,625+ tests.

Life is a contract-first Agent Operating System that treats agents as living systems — with cognition, persistence, homeostasis, identity, finance, networking, observability, and evaluation as first-class computational primitives.

## Install

```bash
cargo install arcan
arcan shell --provider mock    # zero-config, works immediately
arcan shell                    # auto-detects Anthropic/OpenAI/Ollama from env
```

## Modules

- **aiOS** — Kernel contract: canonical types, traits, event taxonomy (aios-protocol)
- **Arcan** — Agent runtime: event loop, multi-provider LLM, streaming, TUI, shell REPL
- **Lago** — Event-sourced persistence: append-only journal, blob store, knowledge graph
- **Autonomic** — Homeostasis: three-pillar regulation (operational, cognitive, economic)
- **Praxis** — Tool execution: sandbox, hashline editing, MCP server/client bridge
- **Haima** — Agentic finance: x402 machine-to-machine payments, per-task billing
- **Nous** — Metacognitive evaluation: inline heuristics, LLM-as-judge, quality signals
- **Anima** — Identity: soul profiles, belief states, trust networks
- **Vigil** — Observability: OpenTelemetry tracing, GenAI semantic conventions
- **Spaces** — Distributed networking: SpacetimeDB 2.0 real-time pub/sub

## Architecture

All modules depend on aiOS (the kernel contract). Arcan is the primary runtime that orchestrates all other modules. The agent's message history IS the application state — every action produces immutable events in Lago.

## Key Capabilities

- Multi-provider LLM support (Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, Apple on-device, any OpenAI-compatible API)
- MCP server/client bridge via Praxis — expose or consume Model Context Protocol tools
- Event-sourced persistence with Lago — every agent action is an immutable event
- Streaming markdown rendering in terminal with ANSI styling
- Reasoning/thinking token display for models like gemma4
- Homeostatic regulation — automatic context compaction, budget management
- x402 machine-to-machine payments via Haima
- Real-time agent-to-agent communication via Spaces (SpacetimeDB)

## API

Arcan exposes an HTTP API on port 3000:
- POST /chat — send message, receive streaming SSE response
- GET /health — health check
- GET /v1/sessions — list sessions
- POST /v1/sessions/{id}/messages — send message to session

## MCP Integration

Praxis implements both MCP server and client:
- Server: expose Arcan's tool registry to Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any MCP host
- Client: connect to external MCP servers and bridge their tools into the agent loop

## Repository

- Crates.io: https://crates.io/crates/arcan
- Docs: https://broomva.tech/start-here
